articles.title: Vitalik Buterin Feels Sorry for Ethereum Rival Solana Amidst SEC Crypto Crackdown
articles.description: In a recent exchange with Matt Huang, Co-Founder and Managing Partner of Paradigm, a crypto-focused venture capital firm, Ethereum’s creator Vitalik Buterin expressed his concerns over the U.S. policy approach to cryptocurrency. His comments came in the wake of the U.S. Security and Exchange Commission’s (SEC) lawsuits against Binance and Coinbase, two of the world’s […]

articles.title: SOL Surpassed ETH in Daily NFT Sales for the First Time Ever
articles.description: A Solana (SOL) data analytics platform, Step Data Insights, took to Twitter on Friday to announce that Solana flipped Ethereum (ETH) in terms of 24-hour NFT sales volume for the first time ever. The analytics platform highlighted the fact that Solana was able to achieve this in a bear market, which is an enormous feat. […]

articles.title: Bitcoin Maxi: ‘We Don’t Need BTC ETFs,’ SEC Focus on Eliminating XRP, ADA
articles.description: In a Twitter outburst, Max Keiser, a well-known Bitcoin maximalist, expressed his indifference toward the Securities and Exchange Commission’s (SEC) position on Bitcoin ETFs. Keiser boldly claimed that Bitcoin was untouchable and urged SEC Chairman Gary Gensler to focus on eliminating what he called ‘shitcoins,’ which included Ethereum (ETH), Ripple (XRP), Cardano (ADA), Binance Coin […]

articles.title: Ripple Case Ruling To Have Tremendous Impact On Bitcoin And Crypto, Lawyer Says
articles.description: John Deaton, a lawyer and one of the vocal proponents of XRP, is convinced that the outcome of the ongoing case between Ripple, the blockchain company, and the United States Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) will impact the cryptocurrency markets depending on the judge’s ruling. articles.title: Ethereum Co-Founder Thinks The Over $40 Billion Staked ETH Can Be Stolen
articles.description: It appears that the co-founder of Ethereum, Vitalik Buterin, doesn’t trust the security of infrastructure allowing ETH staking. Consequently, in a recent interview, Buterin stated that he would only stake a limited amount of coins to ensure the network is distributed and remain robust against malicious agents who might try to take over the platform, reversing transactions.
